title: FireAngel Optical Smoke Alarm 2-Pack - FA6620 10-Year Battery Smoke Alarms for Home with Test/Silence Button - Replacement for FireAngel ST-622/ST-620 - Early Smoke Detector Fire Alarm - White
features: SMOKE DETECTORS FOR HOME: The optical smoke alarm makes protecting your home simple. Its optical sensing chamber 'sees' smoke as it enters the alarm, providing a fast response to slow burning fires with thick white smoke.
FEWER NUISANCE ALARMS: The advanced optical sensor ensures the FireAngel smoke alarm is less prone to false alerts from cooking fumes. Avoid placing near bathrooms or kitchens.
10-YEAR BATTERY: Each smoke alarm is fitted with a 10-year sealed battery, offering protection for the lifetime of the device without needing to change the batteries.

EASY INSTALLATION: Fitted with a removable base plate, secure it to the ceiling using the screws provided. Push and twist to secure the device. The base plate is identical to the ST622, making replacements quick and easy.

SAFETY ASSURED: The FA6620 smoke alarm holds CE and UKCA marks and is certified to BS EN 14604:2005+AC:2008. Suitable for domestic premises, including leisure accommodation vehicles, it comes with a 5-year warranty.
description: From the manufacturer Fire Safety At FireAngel, we're dedicated to protecting and improving our customers’ lives by creating innovative, cutting-edge fire safety technology that is both practical and accessible. The FireAngel FA6620-R Optical Smoke Alarm has been designed to make protecting your home simple, with an easy installation process, fewer false alarms, and rigorous testing. OPTICAL SENSOR: The FA6620’s optical smoke-sensing chamber works by 'seeing' smoke as it enters the alarm, making it ideal for slow-burning fires that produce thick, white smoke. Whilst it is less prone to false alarms from cooking fumes, it can still be triggered by steam. Not suitable for kitchens or bathrooms. SEALED-FOR-LIFE BATTERY: The FA6620 smoke detector has a 10-year, tamper-proof battery that will last the lifetime of the alarm. A red operational LED will flash, and an audible beep will alert you when the device needs replacing. FOR DOMESTIC PREMISES ONLY: Suitable for domestic premises, including leisure accommodation vehicles (mobile homes and caravans). Not suitable for commercial properties. Designed to replace the ST-622 and ST-620 smoke alarms, the baseplate is identical to the ST-622, making replacements quick and easy. FireAngel: Smarter solutions for safer homes. Early Warning System Smoke alarms provide an essential early warning system for potential house fires. The FA6620 smoke alarm holds both CE and UKCA marks, has been rigorously third-party tested, and is certified to BS EN 14604:2005+AC:2008. Sleep Easy To test your device, press the large test button. A loud, high-pitched sound will verify that the alarm is functioning correctly. In a known false alarm, press and hold the test button to temporarily silence the alarm for 10 minutes. If a low battery alert occurs at night, you can silence the smoke detector for 8 hours by pressing the test button. Safety Guidelines The FA6620 is suitable for the landing, hallway, bedroom, living room and dining room. Smoke alarms should be sited at least 300 mm from light fittings and walls, and ideally as central as possible in the room. Avoid installing near kitchens or bathrooms. Sensor Type Optical Battery Type Sealed-for-life lithium battery Alarm Sound Level 85dB(A) at 3m (minimum) Installation Positions Wall or ceiling Operating Temperature +4°C to +38°C Operating Humidity Up to 90% RH (non condensing) Storage Temperature -20°C to +60°C Storage Humidity Up to 93% RH (non condensing) Certified to EN 14604:2005+AC:2008 Weight 138 g Leisure Accommodation Vehicles Yes Safety First What should I do if my smoke alarm sounds? In the event of a smoke alarm sounding: STAY CALM: Don’t panic, take immediate action to ensure your own safety and that of others. CHECK FOR SMOKE OR FIRE: Look for visible smoke or flames. If you see either, evacuate immediately. EVACUATE: Leave the premises as quickly as possible using the nearest exit. Do not use lifts. Take the stairs. Ensure everyone is accounted for and exits safely. CLOSE THE DOORS: Close doors behind you as you leave to slow the spread of smoke. CALL 999: Once outside, call the emergency services, providing the operator with your location and any details about the fire. DO NOT RE-ENTER: Do not go back into the building until it has been declared safe by the fire service. About Us We pride ourselves on product reliability and quality. Since 1998, we’ve deployed over 80 million safety products, protecting over 25 million homes nationwide. Sustainability We’re committed to reducing our impact on the planet; that’s why we've reduced the plastic in our packaging and have unique products that use less energy. The FireAngel range In addition to our smoke alarms for the home, we offer a wide range of other safety products designed to protect you and your family. Choose from smart and wireless devices, as well as standard fire, carbon monoxide (CO), and heat alarms.
